channel.title: Trajectory.quest — The Daily Brief
channel.description: A two-host conversation about what the evidence actually says on living longer. Plain English. No jargon. Promising vs. proven. Updated daily — see the diff at trajectory.quest.
channel.itunes:summary: A two-host conversation about what the evidence actually says on living longer. Plain English. No jargon. Promising vs. proven.
channel.itunes:author: trajectory.quest

item.title: 001 — The dirt on Easter Island that might add 15 years to your life
item.description: Two hosts walk through rapamycin — the molecule scraped off a stone head on Easter Island in 1972 that has extended lifespan in every species we've tested. Plain English: how it works, what we know, what we don't, and why you shouldn't buy it online.
item.itunes:summary: Two hosts walk through rapamycin — the molecule scraped off a stone head on Easter Island in 1972 that has extended lifespan in every species we've tested. Plain English: how it works, what we know, what we don't, and why you shouldn't buy it online.
